title: The Machine Learning Model Testing Component
description: A flowchart illustrating the role and process of the test component within the machine learning pipeline, showing how a trained model is evaluated on unseen data.
elements: Performance Metrics (e.g., Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-Score)
relationships: The Trained Model receives the Hold-Out Test Dataset as input to make predictions
The predictions are compared to the true labels to calculate Performance Metrics
The process outputs a Test Results report which provides an unbiased estimate of the model's real-world performance
